description_long: This sculpture depicts a male figure bound to a tree, with his arms raised and tied to the branches above. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with detailed musculature and draped cloth around his waist. The tree is gnarled and leafless, its branches extending upward and outward, adding dramatic tension to the scene. The base is a simple square platform, supporting both the figure and the tree. The sculpture is primarily a pale stone or painted material, with some darker accents on the tree and base. The overall composition conveys a sense of struggle and restraint, with the figure's expression and posture emphasizing his plight.
description: A detailed classical sculpture of a bound male figure attached to a gnarled, leafless tree, standing on a square base. The work features intricate anatomical and drapery details, with a dramatic, expressive pose.
description_view_0: The front view shows the male figure's face, torso, and arms raised and tied to the tree, with the draped cloth and expressive posture clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the figure's left side, showing the tension in his arms and the way the tree's branches curve above him.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the figure and the full structure of the tree, with the branches and trunk dominating the composition.
description_view_3: A side view focusing on the right side of the figure and the tree, emphasizing the depth and three-dimensionality of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a plain background.
